body.title: log.get_timer() instrumentation primitive
body.result: TimerHandle + get_timer() in logging_setup.py. start/stop emits structured log line. 5 tests pass.
body.description: Add TimerHandle class to logging_setup.py. timer = log.get_timer(name, level=logging.DEBUG, **context_kwargs); timer.stop(**result_kwargs) writes one structured log line: name, started=YYYYMMDDHHMMSSuuuuuu, ended=..., elapsed=X.XXXXXX, plus all kwargs. Used by measurement tools and pe_chain steps. Prerequisite for T-reading-measure-baseline.
